name: minemodcraft
description: Minecraft Mod/Addon ビジュアル開発スタジオ
author: CubicEngine Studio

scripts.build:sprout:win: cross-env MMC_EDITION=sprout MMC_EDITION_UPPER=SPROUT next build && cross-env MMC_EDITION=sprout MMC_EDITION_UPPER=SPROUT electron-builder --win
scripts.build:sprout:mac: cross-env MMC_EDITION=sprout MMC_EDITION_UPPER=SPROUT next build && cross-env MMC_EDITION=sprout MMC_EDITION_UPPER=SPROUT electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:grove:win: cross-env MMC_EDITION=grove MMC_EDITION_UPPER=GROVE next build && cross-env MMC_EDITION=grove MMC_EDITION_UPPER=GROVE electron-builder --win
scripts.build:grove:mac: cross-env MMC_EDITION=grove MMC_EDITION_UPPER=GROVE next build && cross-env MMC_EDITION=grove MMC_EDITION_UPPER=GROVE electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:all:win: npm run build:sprout:win && npm run build:grove:win
scripts.build:all:mac: npm run build:sprout:mac && npm run build:grove:mac
scripts.build:all: npm run build:all:win && npm run build:all:mac
